description_long: This object is a rectangular, deep maroon-colored display case or container with a transparent glass or acrylic front panel. Inside, it contains several small cylindrical objects with green and gray coloring, possibly representing vials or canisters, arranged in a row. The case has a solid, opaque top and sides, with the transparent section only on one face, allowing visibility of the contents from the front. The structure appears sturdy and box-like, with clean, sharp edges and a flat top surface. There are no visible handles, lids, or external markings, and the overall design is utilitarian and secure, likely intended for display or storage in a public or semi-public urban environment. The interior is mostly empty except for the displayed items, and the case is elevated, suggesting it is meant to be viewed at standing height.
description: A maroon rectangular display case with a transparent front panel, containing several small green and gray canisters. The case is sturdy, box-like, and designed for secure display or storage.
description_view_0: A solid maroon face with no visible openings or transparent sections, showing the opaque back or side of the case.
description_view_1: A partial side view revealing the transparent front panel and a glimpse of the interior with one canister visible.
description_view_2: A direct view of the transparent front panel, clearly displaying four green and gray canisters inside the case.
description_view_3: A partial side view with the transparent panel visible, showing one canister and part of the interior.
